SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety

Class SafetyAnalysisFunctionEvaluation

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.SafetyAnalysisFunctionEvaluation
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class SafetyAnalysisFunctionEvaluation extends Object implements Serializable
Simplified API RP 14C / ISO 10418 protective safety-function coverage evaluation.

Compares the protective (Safety Analysis Function) devices provided on a process component against the simplified set required by API RP 14C (Analysis, Design, Installation, and Testing of Basic Surface Safety Systems for Offshore Production Platforms) and ISO 10418. The standard function codes used here are:

Protective function codes
Code Function
PSH Pressure Safety High (high-pressure shutdown)
PSL Pressure Safety Low (low-pressure shutdown)
PSV Pressure Safety Valve (relief)
LSH Level Safety High
LSL Level Safety Low
TSH Temperature Safety High
BSDV Boarding / blowdown shutdown valve

This is a simplified screening aid. It performs no undesirable-event analysis, does not credit alternate protection per the API RP 14C SAFE-chart methodology, and does not assess device reliability or testing. A formal SAFE chart prepared by a qualified safety engineer is required for design decisions.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Community

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SafetyAnalysisFunctionEvaluation()
    Creates an evaluator with the default watch threshold of 1.0 (full coverage required).
    SafetyAnalysisFunctionEvaluation(double watchThreshold)
    Creates an evaluator with a custom coverage watch threshold.

      private final double watchThreshold

  • Constructor Details

    • SafetyAnalysisFunctionEvaluation

      public SafetyAnalysisFunctionEvaluation()
      Creates an evaluator with the default watch threshold of 1.0 (full coverage required).

    • SafetyAnalysisFunctionEvaluation

      public SafetyAnalysisFunctionEvaluation(double watchThreshold)
      Creates an evaluator with a custom coverage watch threshold.
      Parameters:
      watchThreshold - the coverage ratio below which a "watch" flag is raised even with no missing functions; must be in the interval (0, 1]
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if watchThreshold is not in (0, 1]

  • Method Details

    • evaluate

      public SafetyAnalysisFunctionEvaluation.Result evaluate(String componentType, Iterable<String> providedFunctions)
      Evaluates the protective-function coverage of a component.
      Parameters:
      componentType - the component type; case-insensitive, spaces/hyphens are normalised to underscores. Must be one of the supported types (see getSupportedComponentTypes()).
      providedFunctions - the protective function codes provided on the component; case-insensitive, duplicates ignored. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      the SafetyAnalysisFunctionEvaluation.Result of the coverage evaluation
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if componentType is null or unsupported, or if providedFunctions is null or contains a blank code

    • getSupportedComponentTypes

      public static Set<String> getSupportedComponentTypes()
      Returns the sorted set of supported component types.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable sorted set of supported component-type keys

    • warning

      private String warning(List<String> missing, double coverageRatio)
      Determines the screening warning flag from the missing functions and coverage ratio.
      Parameters:
      missing - the missing function codes
      coverageRatio - the coverage ratio (0-1)
      Returns:
      "gap" when any function is missing, "watch" when coverage is below the watch threshold, otherwise "ok"

    • normalizeType

      private static String normalizeType(String componentType)
      Normalises and validates a component type.
      Parameters:
      componentType - the raw component type
      Returns:
      the normalised component-type key
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if null or not a supported type

    • normalizeFunctions

      private static List<String> normalizeFunctions(Iterable<String> providedFunctions)
      Normalises the provided function codes to upper case, removing duplicates.
      Parameters:
      providedFunctions - the provided function codes
      Returns:
      an ordered list of unique, upper-case function codes
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if null, or if any code is null or blank

    • listOf

      private static List<String> listOf(String... codes)
      Builds an unmodifiable list from the supplied codes.
      Parameters:
      codes - the function codes
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list containing the codes in order
